sentiment.summary: Stocks sold off as unemployment jumped to 4.4%, oil spiked 12% on Strait of Hormuz closure, and VIX surged to highest since October — classic stagflation fear trade.

insights.text: Stagflation fears slam Wall Street. Unemployment spiked to 4.4% while oil surged 12% on Strait of Hormuz closure. VIX exploded to 29.49 (+24%). Blackrock capped withdrawals on a private credit fund. Risk-off across the board — energy the only winner.

Bitcoin sliding despite bullish news cycle. BTC dropped to $68K despite a midweek push to $74K. Fear & Greed at 18 (Extreme Fear). You're underwater from your $73,135 cost basis — macro is overriding crypto sentiment entirely.

Rocket Lab holding $70 in a brutal selloff. Trading above your $62 cost basis despite market carnage. 10/10 analysts say Buy, avg target $90. Two launches in six days shows execution. Neutron delay to Q4 2026 is the only real risk.

EchoStar pivots hard — kills D2D, partners SpaceX. At $109 vs your $114 cost, slightly underwater. Took $16B impairment on 5G decom. Cash influx expected H1 2026 for debt reduction. The SpaceX equity stake remains the hidden value play.

T1 Energy gets tax credit confirmation. At $6.72, flat to your $6.73 cost. Section 45X credits confirmed plus $160M PTC sale closed. 900MW Treaty Oak supply deal is a strong catalyst. Analysts unanimous Strong Buy with $10.71 avg target.

Seagate caught in AI export restriction fears. Down to $375 from your $449 cost — 16% loss. China chip restrictions and insider selling weigh heavy. HAMR tech promising but Iran oil shock inflates server costs. Analyst target $475.

Telesat flat near cost — fraud probes linger. At $33 vs your $33.33 entry. Multiple law firm investigations ongoing. Lightspeed LEO on track for late 2026 launch. Earnings March 26. High volatility, low conviction — tread carefully.

BigBear.ai in freefall — down 56% from cost. At $4.00 vs your $9.02 entry. Q4 revenue crashed 38% YoY to $27.3M, gross margin collapsed to 20%. 2026 guidance $135-165M shows hope but execution risk is massive.

Nebius earns Bloomberg 500 inclusion March 12. At $89 vs your $131 cost — still 32% underwater. Missouri 1.2GW AI factory approved. Revenue up 461-547% YoY. Fundamentals accelerating but needs AI sentiment recovery.

Oklo halved from your $125 entry. Trading around $61 — a 51% loss. 14 analysts still rate Buy with $112 avg target. Earnings March 17 is the next big catalyst. Pre-revenue nuclear play requires serious patience.

Navitas pivoting to high-power AI markets. At $9.50 vs your $10 cost — nearly flat. Mobile revenue dropped below 25% as company shifts to GaN/SiC power semis. 250kW Solid-State Transformer for AI data centers is innovative. CFO departing mid-pivot.
